sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, date_value Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, date_value) VALUES (1, toDateOrZero('2022-12-30'));
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, date_value) VALUES (2, toDateOrZero(''));
SELECT id, date_value, toDateOrZero(date_value) as adjusted_date FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET date_value = toDateOrZero('invalid-date') WHERE id = 1;
